summary::Here Are The Perfect Pokémon Fo: Simon Peter, the leader of the 12 apostles, would likely have Geodude as his first Pokémon partner due to its strength and ability to withstand harsh environments. His second partner could be Cramorant, reflecting his role as a fisher and his message of catching people off guard with Jesus' teachings.
summary::Crimson Desert's Kliff actor wo: Crimson Desert's Kliff actor would play the character "forever," and thinks his relationship with other key characters is "territory that can be even further developed" in order to take their story to new heights.
